mapper.update: update companyEntity set name = #{name}, title = #{title}, zhaiyao = #{zhaiyao}, subContent = #{subContent}, content = #{content}, mbcontent = #{mbcontent}, img = #{img}, mbimg = #{mbimg}, case1 = #{case1}, case2 = #{case2}, case3 = #{case3}, person = #{person}, job = #{job}, pimg = #{pimg}, history = #{history}, sortID = #{sortID}, isShow = #{isShow}, updateTime = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
